action.reasoning: Observation: Empty workspace, starting fresh. Task is ASVspoof 2021 LA deepfake detection with EER metric. Analysis: Need to build a strong classifier using pretrained wav2vec2/wavlm. Key challenges: codec generalization (test has telephony codecs), unseen attacks/speakers. Decision: Start with wav2vec2-xls-r-300m (good for cross-domain) with simple pooling head, train a few epochs first to validate pipeline.
